title: ayenia asplundii
intro: Ayenia asplundii, also known as the Mexican ayenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ayenia asplundii include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Ayenia asplundii include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and then brewing them in hot water.
